case_title: MICHAEL FISKE VS. VICTOR E. COCCHIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF FISKE, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT COCCHIA, VICTOR E. AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
